name: TLC59208F
description: The TLC59208F output component exposes a TLC59208F PWM channel of a global [TLC59208F chip](https://esphome.io/components/output/tlc59208f#tlc59208f-component) as a float output.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this output component.

config_entries.label: Channel
config_entries.description: Choose the channel of the TLC59208F for this output component. Must be in range from 0 to 7.

config_entries.label: Tlc59208F ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [TLC59208F chip](https://esphome.io/components/output/tlc59208f#tlc59208f-component). Use this if you have multiple TLC59208Fs you want to use at the same time.
